data.title: New Charter Technologies Adds GraVoc, Expanding Strategic Services and Building Shared Momentum
data.description: GraVoc has recently joined New Charter Technologies, bringing enhanced expertise in ERP, business solutions, and creative services. This collaboration aims to bolster a more interconnected and strategic IT approach. The announcement was made on April 16, 2026, in Denver. New Charter Technologies, known for prioritizing people-centric technology solutions, is paving the way for innovation in the industry.

data.title: Consumer Action for a Strong Economy Launches New Ad Campaign Ahead of Ways and Means Hearing with HHS Secretary Robert F. Kennedy Jr.
data.description: On April 16, 2026, Consumer Action for a Strong Economy (CASE) revealed a new advertising campaign prior to HHS Secretary Robert F. Kennedy Jr.'s upcoming testimony at the House Ways and Means Committee. This initiative aims to bolster their advocacy efforts through a sustained promotional push.

data.title: Global Times: China International Consumer Products Expo kicks off in Haikou, as foreign businesses arrive in record numbers to tap into China market
data.description: On April 16, 2026, in Beijing, a large crowd flooded the venue as numerous business agreements were made and photographs were taken, while the latest items garnered enthusiastic interest. The atmosphere resembled a sprawling international market, with attendees from various countries engaging with one another.

data.title: ELEGOO Announces Jupiter 2 Global Launch and Debuts the Multicolor System for Centauri Carbon  at RAPID + TCT 2026
data.description: In Boston on April 16, 2026, ELEGOO, a fast-growing player in the global smart manufacturing sector, showcased its advancements at RAPID + TCT 2026. The event featured the introduction of Jupiter 2, marking a significant milestone for the company. Additionally, a notable unveiling was the CANVAS for Centauri Carbon multicolor system. This debut represents a major achievement as it is the first of its kind in the industry. These developments highlight ELEGOO's commitment to innovation and integration in 3D technology, solidifying its position as a prominent player in the market.

data.title: TCG Trade N Play to Host First-Ever Trading Card Event at Raymond James Stadium
data.description: A renowned venue in Tampa Bay is set to host a special trading card celebration, welcoming collectors, players, and families for a one-day event on April 16, 2026. The event is organized by TCG Trade N Play, a Florida-based brand that has significantly expanded its reach, with over 60 events scheduled for 2026 compared to 15 in 2025. This growth reflects the increasing popularity of trading card events, aiming to provide a vibrant and engaging experience for participants.

data.title: Reclamation Partners Acquires 33,619-Square Foot Light Industrial Facility in Boston, MA
data.description: Boston-based company Reclamation Partners, in collaboration with EOZ Ventures, has successfully acquired a 33,619-square foot light-industrial facility situated at 1023 Turnpike Street, Stoughton, MA. The building is located within Boston's infill Route-128 South area.

data.title: HELE SHAREHOLDER REMINDER: Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP Investigates Claims on Behalf of Investors of Helen of Troy
data.description: James (Josh) Wilson, Securities Litigation Partner at Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP, is urging investors who experienced substantial losses in Helen of Troy to reach out to him for a discussion about their options. If you suffered notable losses in Helen of Troy's stock or options, you are encouraged to contact him directly to explore potential courses of action.

data.title: The York Water Company Announces Pricing of 2026 Public Offering of Common Stock
data.description: In York, Pennsylvania, on April 16, 2026, The York Water Company, a water and wastewater utility service provider trading as YORW on NASDAQ, revealed the pricing details of its recent underwritten public offering. The offering consisted of 1,521,739 shares of common stock priced at $28.50 per share for a total estimated gross amount of around $43 million, excluding underwriting fees. The company has also allowed the underwriters a 30-day option to buy an extra 228,261 shares at the same price, less applicable fees.

data.title: SELECT Announces Automated BigQuery Cost Optimization Early Access Program
data.description: A new solution is set to be launched, merging a successful data platform visibility and automation engine with DoiT's extensive expertise in serving BigQuery clients. The integration will bring together cutting-edge technologies and deep industry knowledge. The announcement was made in Santa Clara, California on April 16, 2026. This collaboration signals the commitment to enhancing services for clients using BigQuery, catering to their specific needs.

data.title: LTC Announces Date of First Quarter 2026 Earnings Release, Conference Call and Webcast
data.description: In Westlake Village, California, LTC Properties Inc. (NYSE: LTC) is set to announce its first quarter earnings on May 6, 2026, after the market closes. Following this, on May 7, 2026, at 8:00 a.m. Pacific / 11:00 a.m. Eastern, the company will hold a conference call to discuss its performance for the quarter ending March 31, 2026. Those interested can join the conference call live via a webcast at the provided link.

data.title: Blackmagic Design Announces Blackmagic Camera for iOS 3.3 Update
data.description: Blackmagic Design unveiled the latest version of its Blackmagic Camera for iOS - version 3.3, tailored for iPhones. The update introduces enhanced functionality allowing users to control and monitor the camera through an Apple Watch. This feature permits users to initiate and cease recordings, as well as oversee the shot directly from their watch, particularly beneficial when the iPhone is inaccessible. Additionally, this update incorporates support for ATEM camera control, further empowering users with expanded capabilities for their iPhone camera.

data.title: Andersen Consulting Adds Collaborating Firm Nuvolar
data.description: In San Francisco, Andersen Consulting recently announced a significant development in its digital transformation strategy by entering into a Collaboration Agreement with Nuvolar, a prominent technology consultancy. This partnership aims to expand Andersen Consulting's digital transformation platform and enhance its suite of services in the tech sector. This move signifies a strategic step forward for Andersen Consulting in strengthening its position in the market.

data.title: Neuro Launches First Brand Campaign: 'Gum Is Dumb, Neuro Is Smart (Gum)'
data.description: Neuro, a popular brand known for their functional gum and mints containing science-backed ingredients, has unveiled their latest campaign in Las Vegas on April 16, 2026. The brand has taken a bold and innovative approach by featuring real sloths in their promotional material, coupled with sharp creative concepts that promise to leave a lasting impact. This move signifies a new direction for Neuro, with a focus on disrupting the conventional gum market. With their campaign showcasing zero chill for regular gum, Neuro is aiming to make a significant splash in the industry.

data.title: Guideline Launches KPI Forecast 2.0, Delivering Advanced Ticker-Level Forecasting for Capital Markets
data.description: A new service has been introduced that utilizes unique ad spend information to offer precise, data-driven revenue forecasting for institutional investors such as hedge funds, mutual funds, and quantitative fund managers. This offering, provided by Guideline, incorporates advanced data science techniques to help with accurate predictions. The service was launched in New York on April 16, 2026.

data.title: Remote People Named Best Employer of Record for 2026 by Outsource Accelerator
data.description: Remote People, a worldwide Employer of Record (EOR) and HR platform, secured leading positions in Employer of Record, payroll outsourcing, HR SaaS, and recruitment software rankings for 2026. The company, based in New York, achieved this recognition on April 16, 2026.

data.title: Why Smart Money is Securing Pivotal Gold Reserves Now
data.description: Lake Victoria Gold Ltd. reports that central banks acquired a total of 27 tonnes of physical gold in February 2026. This significant increase indicates a strategic move to boost reserves. This action, marked by its subtlety, reveals a deliberate effort to secure tangible assets amidst uncertain economic conditions.

data.title: Lanai Launches AI @ Work Operating System to Help Enterprises Close the AI Accountability Gap
data.description: Today, Lanai, an enterprise AI accountability company based in San Francisco, announced the launch of the first platform capable of tracking every AI workflow, whether purchased, developed in-house, or integrated covertly. The platform enables users to evaluate the effectiveness of these workflows and determine necessary courses of action. This significant development was revealed on April 16, 2026, marking a milestone in AI technology advancement and corporate accountability.
